page_content:
Formerly: EDPS635.

TLPL694 Embracing Diversity: Critical Foundations of Schooling and Education (3 Credits)

Introduces teacher candidates to critical, sociocultural foundations of U.S. schooling, education, and society. Teacher candidates interrogate what it means to be an anti-racist, social justice-oriented educator in a pluralistic classroom.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
